pkgmetadata.longdescription: Claude Desktop is the official desktop application for Claude, an AI assistant by Anthropic. This binary package repackages the official Linux build maintained by the upstream community.

use.flag: Use gnome-extra/gnome-screenshot as a Computer Use screenshot fallback on GNOME
Enable Computer Use screenshots on wlroots-based Wayland compositors (Sway, Hyprland) via gui-apps/grim
Enable Quick Entry cursor positioning on Hyprland via gui-wm/hyprland (hyprctl)
Enable Computer Use screenshot fallback and image cropping via media-gfx/imagemagick
Enable Computer Use window queries on Sway via app-misc/jq
Pull in net-libs/nodejs for MCP extensions that require specific Node.js versions (Electron bundles Node.js as a fallback)
Enable Portal screenshot PipeWire frame capture on GNOME Wayland 46+ via media-plugins/gst-plugins-pipewire
Enable Portal screenshots on GNOME Wayland 46+ without repeated permission dialogs via dev-python/pygobject
Enable Computer Use screenshots on X11 via media-gfx/scrot
Enable faster Quick Entry toggle via socket using net-misc/socat
Enable Computer Use screenshots on KDE Plasma Wayland via kde-apps/spectacle
Detect running applications on X11 via x11-misc/wmctrl for Computer Use
Enable X11 Computer Use input, cursor reading, and Quick Entry positioning via x11-misc/xdotool
Enable Computer Use input automation on all Wayland compositors via x11-misc/ydotool (requires ydotoold daemon running)
